title: cymbidium ensifolium subsp. haematodes
intro: Cymbidium ensifolium subsp. haematodes, also known as the Red Sword Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, characterized by its unique, red-colored leaves and flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium ensifolium subsp. haematodes include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as the promotion of wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are said to offer various health benefits when consumed.
